name_cn:
Size Code Chip
M 11736
This Bella Bucket Bag from the Flight Mode collection features classic perforated leather rendered in a seasonal gradient effect, while the lining continues the fresh tones of the body. A detachable coin pouch ensures neat storage, making it a modern choice for beyond winter.
22 x 14 x 19 cm
(H x W x D)
Perforated Calfskin
Calfskin Trim
Microfiber Lining
Metal Hardware
Round Coin Pocket
Metal Studs
Fits short wallet, smartphone, keys, and earphones
Strap: Removable, Adjustable
Drop: 50.0 cm
Drop extends to: 56.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, Removable
